title: High Protein Pizza Bowl
description: Everything you love about pizza in a protein-packed bowl. Ready in 10 minutes with over 40 grams of protein.
instructions: Brown the ground turkey in a skillet over medium heat.
Stir in the pizza sauce and Italian seasoning.
Top with peppers, mushrooms, mozzarella, and pepperoni.
Cover for 2 to 3 minutes until the cheese melts.
pinterest_title: High Protein Pizza Bowl | 40g Protein | Ready in 10 Minutes
pinterest_description: This High Protein Pizza Bowl delivers over 40 grams of protein in about 400 calories. A quick dinner that satisfies pizza cravings while supporting your goals.
